mapper.select: SELECT id, region_id, map_id, grid_x, grid_y, center_x, center_y, created_at FROM region_grid_cells WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY grid_y ASC, grid_x ASC
SELECT id, region_id, map_id, grid_x, grid_y, center_x, center_y, created_at FROM region_grid_cells WHERE map_id = #{mapId} ORDER BY region_id ASC, grid_y ASC, grid_x ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO region_grid_cells (region_id, map_id, grid_x, grid_y, center_x, center_y) VALUES
(#{cell.regionId}, #{cell.mapId}, #{cell.gridX}, #{cell.gridY}, #{cell.centerX}, #{cell.centerY})
